visual_direction.color_bias: Monochrome base with selective colourway pops (#C9A84C accent for text/graphics)
visual_direction.motion_style: Smooth, deliberate camera moves (push-ins, slow reveals); no handheld shake; crisp cuts

shot_list.subject: Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) with Royal Pop case partially inserted
shot_list.action: Slow push-in to reveal 40.35mm case diameter and 0.7mm retaining lip
shot_list.framing: Extreme close-up, side view, centered on adapter-case interface
shot_list.must_capture: 40.35mm case diameter, 0.7mm retaining lip, FKM rubber texture (reference IMG-01 for composition)

shot_list.subject: Exploded technical diagram of Cradle Adapter V1
shot_list.action: Animated callouts for 40.35mm, 0.7mm lip, 22mm lugs, FKM material (SPEC_CALLOUT_MOTION)
shot_list.must_capture: All labeled components (reference IMG-02 for vector source)

shot_list.subject: Royal Pop case snapping into Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome)
shot_list.action: Slow-motion snap (0.5x speed) to emphasize secure fit
shot_list.framing: Side profile, adapter slightly tilted to show retaining lip engagement
shot_list.must_capture: Retaining lip locking mechanism, FKM rubber compression

shot_list.subject: All five colourways (Monochrome, Arctic Blue, Cobalt Orange, Green Eight, Otto Rosso)
shot_list.action: Quick zoom-out from Monochrome to reveal full grid (COLOUR_REVEAL)
shot_list.must_capture: All five verified colourways, consistent FKM texture (reference IMG-03 for layout)

shot_list.subject: Royal Pop on wrist with Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome)
shot_list.action: Smooth transition from pocket (hand holding case) to wrist (strap secured)
shot_list.framing: 30-degree wrist angle, watch face slightly tilted
shot_list.must_capture: Wrist integration, strap alignment, retaining lip visibility (reference IMG-04 for pose)

edit_plan.edit_instruction: Open with Shot 1 (MACRO push-in). Overlay text: '40.35mm exact' (top-left, #F0EDE8, 48pt). Hold for 2s.
Cut to Shot 1 (continued). Replace text with '0.7mm retaining lip' (top-center, #F0EDE8, 48pt). Hold for 1s.
Cut to Shot 1 (continued). Replace text with '22mm lug width' (top-right, #F0EDE8, 48pt). Hold for 1s. Cut to Shot 2 (technical diagram).
Shot 2: Animate callouts sequentially (40.35mm → 0.7mm → 22mm → FKM rubber). Overlay text: 'FKM rubber' (bottom-center, #C9A84C, 40pt). Hold final frame for 1s.
Cut to Shot 3 (snap-in). No text. Sound design: subtle 'click' on snap. Hold for 2s.
Cut to Shot 4 (colourway grid). Overlay text: '5 colourways' (bottom-center, #F0EDE8, 40pt). Quick zoom-out effect (0.5s). Hold final frame for 1s.
Cut to Shot 5 (pocket-to-wrist transition). Overlay text: 'Pocket to wrist in seconds' (top-center, #F0EDE8, 40pt). Smooth whip transition from pocket to wrist.
Final frame: Static wrist shot (Shot 5). Overlay text: 'Pre-Order Now' (center, #C9A84C, 60pt) + website URL (bottom, #F0EDE8, 32pt). Hold for 3s. Fade to black.

asset_requirements.notes: Render HERO_PUSH_IN animation (0.5s push-in) for Shot 1. Ensure 40.35mm and 0.7mm lip are clearly visible.
Provide vector source for SPEC_CALLOUT_MOTION. Animate callouts sequentially (0.5s per label).
Render COLOUR_REVEAL animation (0.5s zoom-out from Monochrome to full grid).
Shoot 10s of 60fps b-roll for slow-motion snap and wrist transition. Ensure retaining lip is visible in wrist shot.
Record/subtle 'click' sound for snap-in (Shot 3). Use high-quality, non-distracting SFX.

briefs.cover_frame_direction: Shot 1 (MACRO push-in) at 1.5s mark (retaining lip fully visible). Overlay text: '40.35mm. 0.7mm. 22mm. Exact fit.' (top 20%, #F0EDE8, 48pt).
briefs.subtitle_style: Centered, #F0EDE8, 28pt, semi-bold, 90% opacity black background. Max 2 lines per subtitle.
briefs.handoff_for_manual_reel: 1. Prioritize crisp focus on 0.7mm retaining lip and 40.35mm case diameter. 2. Use provided vector assets for technical diagram animation. 3. Match on-screen text exactly to 'on_screen_text' array. 4. Ensure FKM rubber texture is visible in all shots. 5. End with 3s hold on CTA frame (website URL + 'Pre-Order Now'). 6. Total runtime: 18s (target 0:15-0:30).

website_truth.verified_disclaimer: Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.
